commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3c8975344e43f616911284bfb97d5733fd68c6f5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds 1 MiB bounded JSON reads to MiniMax image, OAuth device-code, TTS, and video-generation success paths and updates video-generation tests to use real Response objects with an oversized poll-response case.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +25. Total +63 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still has raw response.json() reads on MiniMax image, OAuth device-code, and video success responses, so oversized provider JSON remains source-reproducible; I did not run a live MiniMax call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human PR review is needed because the branch conflicts with current main, overlaps active response-limit work, and the contributor must provide real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for them.

target.title: fix(minimax): bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit`
(1 MiB cap) across MiniMax image-generation, OAuth, TTS, and video-generation
providers (6 call sites in 4 files).

## Proof — Unit tests pass

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/minimax/

 Test Files  9 passed (9)
      Tests  81 passed (81)
   Duration  168.30s
```

### New bounded-response overflow test

**`video-generation-provider.test.ts`** — `rejects oversized poll JSON response and cancels the stream`:
- Mocks oversized poll response (> 1 MiB), verifies the overflow Error is thrown and the stream was cancelled
- Fixes all fake `{ json: async() => ... }` mock objects to real `new Response(...)` throughout the test file

## Changed files

| File | Sites |
|------|------:|
| `extensions/minimax/image-generation-provider.ts` | 1 |
| `extensions/minimax/oauth.ts` | 1 |
| `extensions/minimax/tts.ts` | 1 |
| `extensions/minimax/video-generation-provider.ts` | 3 |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: lsr911
